Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Aug-17-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court's tentative ruling was hearing required.

PLAINTIFF JOSE CRUZ's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One. Off-calendar, no appearances.*** Judge Pro Tem: William C. Lynn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/jpt)

***10:01am - Counsel for Defendant Trina Clayton appears late after the matter has been called. Counsel was in the Law and motion department via Zoom. JPT Lynn informs counsel of its ruling.***

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Jul-20-2023 Continued To Aug-17-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Allen Amarkarian, Esq., QUILL & ARROW, LLP, 310-933-4271, for Plaintiff
TRINA CLAYTON, ESQ., GORDON REES SCULLY MANSUKHANI, LLP, (602) 794-3653, tclayton@grsm.com, for Defendant.

All parties stipulate to Judge Pro Tem William Lynn hearing today's motions. All Parties and Judge Pro Tem William Lynn authorize the clerk to sign the stipulation on their behalf.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF PAVEL FLIDER'S Motion To Deem Facts Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions is continued to August 17, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. Discovery to allow for further meet and confer efforts.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
